description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The documents herein define how the deployment of an Allocation Instance is executed on-chain. In the short-term, an Allocation Instance may also be deployed using the process for Interim Deployments specified in [A.1.

The Prime Agent must subsequently prepare a pro-forma Required Risk Capital estimate, which must be approved by the Core Council Risk Advisor, before the parameters of the Instance can be updated for normal operation.
